title: ChapterSummaries
description: Chapter summaries truth file — structured summaries of each chapter for quick reference. Part of the 7 truth files per REQ-F-14. Mirrors ChapterSummaryRowSchema.

version.description: Schema version for future migration support.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this file was last modified.

chapters.description: Ordered list of chapter summary records. Sorted by chapter number ascending.

characters.description: Characters appearing in this chapter (comma-separated or structured list).

events.description: Summary of key events that occurred in this chapter.

stateChanges.description: Notable state changes (location shifts, power changes, relationship changes).

hookActivity.description: Hook-related activity (new hooks introduced, hooks advanced, hooks resolved).

mood.description: Dominant emotional tone of the chapter.
